title: How a man of God kills what keeps winning
caption:
Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death.

There's a difference. And most men are doing one while thinking they're doing the other.

You've been calling it a struggle, a weakness, a pattern you're working on. Paul calls it something that needs to die. So stop managing and start naming it. Then burn the exits. Every repeated sin has a supply chain. You don't stumble into it. You walk a path you already know.

Plant something that costs you more. Idleness is where sin regrows. And do it with a witness. "Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." James 5:16. The sin that stays secret stays strong.

What you confess starts to die. What you hide stays alive.

Send this to the man who's been managing something he was meant to kill.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #sin #godlymen #manofgod #thework #christianity #accountability
